title: StayNest
shortDescription: Full-stack rental platform for finding and booking cozy stays around and abroad.
longDescription: StayNest is a full-stack web application that allows users to discover, explore and book unique stays. It features secure authentication, real-time availability, and a seamless booking experience.
overview: StayNest was built to simplify the process of finding and booking comfortable and unique stays. The platform focuses on user experience, speed, and reliability.
overviewPoints: Browse and filter stays by location, price, and category
Secure user authentication and profile management

process.title: Research
process.description: Studied user needs and analyzed existing platforms.

process.title: Design
process.description: Created wireframes and UI designs in Figma.

process.title: Development
process.description: Built the full-stack application using MERN stack.

process.title: Testing
process.description: Tested for responsiveness, bugs and performance.

process.title: Deployment
process.description: Deployed on Vercel and MongoDB Atlas.

challenges: Implementing real-time availability with proper performance.
Handling secure payments and edge cases with Stripe.
Ensuring a smooth and responsive experience across devices.
outcomes: Delivered a complete booking platform with great user feedback.
Improved my skills in full-stack development and system design.
Built with scalability and future features in mind.
quote: Every challenge was an opportunity to learn something new.
